messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Block Volume

```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume" "data" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  availability_domain = var.availability_domain
  size_in_gbs      = 100
  display_name     = "data-volume"
}

resource "oci_core_volume_attachment" "iscsi" {
  instance_id = oci_core_instance.vm.id
  volume_id   = oci_core_volume.data.id
  attachment_type = "iscsi"
}
```

### Boot Volume

```hcl
resource "oci_core_boot_volume" "boot" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  availability_domain = var.availability_domain
  size_in_gbs      = 50
  image_id        = var.image_id
}
```

### Volume Group

```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume_group" "vg" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  volume_ids     = [oci_core_volume.data.id]
  display_name   = "volume-group"
}
